title: Chapter 9
content:
Chapter 9: Open, Dragon Anus!

"Lucia, transform into a dragon."

"Just stay still like that."

"Okay."

When she was in dragon form during our first meeting, Lucia had spoken in a domineering tone, but it seemed that had been an act. Now she was speaking in the same timid, hesitant voice as when she was in girl form.

Alright. It’s dark and hard to see, but I found the anus.

I don’t know much about dragon anatomy, but as expected, the asshole was right next to the pussy. I was able to locate it thanks to the sweet scent drifting from her vagina.

"There’s plenty of clubs to choose from."

It was heavy. Even though it was made of wood, it was solid and probably weighed several kilograms.

Her calm voice proved she felt nothing.

"Don’t worry about it. It’s nothing. Just wait a little longer."

Damn it.

"Gattyu Ero Style" wasn’t some special skill or ultimate move — it was just the name of a technique from an old anime I once watched. I couldn’t bring out its true power. If it had been the real Gattyu Ero Style, it should have been able to pierce even a dragon’s anus.

Of course it is. If dragon assholes were weak, there would be legends all over the world about heroes defeating dragons through anal torment. But as seen in the legend of Yamata no Orochi, most dragons are usually defeated after being drunk into a stupor.
